# PERF-183 negative: context.WithTimeout outside the loop, per-iteration values via WithValue
lang: go
file: PERF-183-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"time"
)

type itemKey struct{}

func PerCall(parent context.Context, items []int) []int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(parent, time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	out := make([]int, 0, len(items))
	for _, item := range items {
		iter := context.WithValue(ctx, itemKey{}, item)
		out = append(out, item)
		_ = iter
	}
	return out
}
